message:
fix(connector): bound artifact_persistence store with MAX_TOTAL_ARTIFACTS eviction

artifact_persistence.rs had no capacity limit — both the artifacts BTreeMap and
per-type sequences Vec grew without bound. Added MAX_TOTAL_ARTIFACTS=8192 cap
with oldest-first eviction from the largest type bucket when exceeded.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
